//: Engram setup for Claude Code. Merge the env + hooks blocks into your ~/.claude/settings.json (keep your existing entries). Replace /Users/you/... with real paths. ENGRAM_VAULT = working-memory vault; ENGRAM_MEMORY = durable-memory dir (optional).

hooks.//PreToolUse: Optional: the deterministic rules-as-hooks guard. Edit hooks/guard.py's BLOCKED list first, then uncomment by renaming this key to 'PreToolUse'.
